anticipated_questions.TRL_9: Has the actual system successfully operated over full range of conditions in operational environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_8: Has the actual system successfully operated in limited operational environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_7: Has the full scale system prototype successfully been demonstrated in relevant operational environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_6: Has the engineering/pilot-scale prototype been demonstrated in relevant environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_5: Has the laboratory scale prototype been validated in relevant environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_4: Has the component / system been validated in lab?
anticipated_questions.TRL_3: Has the proof of concept been demonstrated in a simulated environment?
anticipated_questions.TRL_2: Has the technical solution for the system and/or process concept been formulated?
anticipated_questions.TRL_1: Have the basic technology and principles been observed and reported?
